function.name: BoneReconstructionPlanner
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for BoneReconstructionPlanner. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': 1. If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.; 'cb_step_2': 2. In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.; 'cb_step_3': 3. In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.; 'cb_step_4': 4. For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.; 'cb_step_5': 5. Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.; 'cb_step_6': 6. Change the layout to "Conventional".; 'cb_step_7': 7. For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".; 'cb_step_8': 8. For the R (red) view, select "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).; 'cb_step_9': 9. In the "Crosshair selection" toolbar, toggle on "slice intersection visibility" (shows crosshair lines at slice intersections in 2D views).; 'cb_step_10': 10. In the "Crosshair selection" toolbar, toggle on "enable interaction" (allows dragging the crosshair to navigate slices by clicking in 2D views).

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps
